allow: Bash(cmd /c "for /f ""tokens=5"" %a in \(''netstat -ano ^| findstr :8000 ^| findstr LISTENING''\) do taskkill /PID %a /F")
Bash(cmd /c "for /f \\"tokens=5\\" %p in \('netstat -aon ^| findstr \\"0.0.0.0:8000\\"'\) do @echo PID: %p & wmic process where processid^=%p get name^,commandline /format:list 2>nul" 2>&1)
